summary: Plan only for the Clownfish automerge repair cluster. No GitHub mutations are proposed. #94452 remains the canonical repair branch, but its current head has a failing check-test-types result and the latest ClawSweeper verdict still requires maintainer review before merge, so the executable path is a contributor-branch repair artifact rather than merge or closeout.

actions.reason: Keep the issue open and linked to the canonical repair PR until a fix lands and validation passes.
Security-sensitive hydrated ref is quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling; no ProjectClownfish mutation is proposed.
Related candidate in the same root-cause family, but #94452 is the canonical automerge branch for this job.
The canonical PR is repairable and inside the bounded automerge loop, but not merge-ready because check-test-types is failing and the ClawSweeper verdict is not a passing merge verdict.
Related same symptom family, but it has a different implementation scope and unresolved CI/review blockers, so it should not be treated as the canonical automerge repair path.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #94452 in place so the maintainer-opted Clownfish automerge candidate can get a fresh ClawSweeper verdict on the exact current head. Scope is limited to the failing check-test-types result and any directly related fallout in the existing nodes approve stale request handling patch.
repair_candidate.pr_title: Repair #94452 nodes approve stale request handling for Clownfish automerge
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Clownfish repair artifact for the maintainer-opted automerge candidate #94452.

Scope:
- keep the existing #94452 behavior: translate stale or unknown node pairing request IDs into actionable `openclaw nodes approve` output;
- repair the current failing `check-test-types` result on head `9490fd958f757d28802fe2983871fe5ab7626d7a`;
- keep changes limited to `src/cli/nodes-cli/register.pairing.ts` and `src/cli/nodes-cli.coverage.test.ts` unless the failing type check proves a narrower adjacent file is required.

Validation:
- `pnpm check:changed`
- the repository command behind `check-test-types`, if exposed locally
- fresh ClawSweeper review on the repaired #94452 head

Credit:
- source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94452
- contributor: mushuiyu886
- related prior work: #94115 and #94532 remain credited as related candidate fixes, not replacement branches.
validation_commands: run the repository command behind the failing check-test-types job for the changed files if available
request a fresh ClawSweeper review for #94452 after repair
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for mushuiyu886 as the #94452 author and source branch owner.
Keep #94115 by Monkey-wusky and #94532 by xiaoping1988 as related prior art in repair notes if their ideas are referenced, but do not replace #94452 unless the branch becomes unsafe to update.
